commit.message:
[renovate] Declare ws-0297 hosted gate support surfaces

Purpose: Align ws-0297 ownership metadata with the hosted validation files touched during the live runner recovery.
Scope: Update the workstream document and registry surface declarations.
Status: The previously failing workstream-surfaces and generated-doc lanes now pass locally.
Next: Re-push the branch to private Gitea and continue the hosted validate, release-bundle, and renovate verification.
See also: ADR 0297
